zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton於1476年出生在英國爾波易頓時，他的父親Sir John Warren41歲，母親Eleanor Gerard9歲。他於1494年7月5日與Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh在英國英格蘭爾迪斯利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和11個女兒的父母。他去世於1531年9月18日在英國爾普雷斯特波利享年55歲，埋葬在英國爾普雷斯特波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton于1476年出生在英国爾波易頓时，他的父亲Sir John Warren41岁，母亲Eleanor Gerard9岁。他于1494年7月5日与Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh在英国英格兰爾迪斯利结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和11个女儿的父母。他去世于1531年9月18日在英国爾普雷斯特波利享年55岁，埋葬在英国爾普雷斯特波利。

nameMeanings.name: Laurence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French form of Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’. Laurentum was a town in Latium, which may have got its name from Latin laurus ‘laurel’, although it is more probably of pre-Roman origin. The given name was moderately popular in the Middle Ages (when it was used for girls as well as boys), under the influence of a 3rd-century saint who was one of the seven deacons of Rome. He was martyred in 258 . The legend is that, having been required to hand over the Church's treasures to the civil authorities, he assembled the poor and sick and presented them. For this act of Christian defiance, he was roasted to death on a gridiron. In England the name is also associated with St Laurence of Canterbury ( d. 619 ). A more recent influence has been the actor Sir Laurence Olivier ( 1907–89 ). See also Lawrence .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton was born in 1476, in Poynton, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir John Warren, was 41 and his mother, Eleanor Gerard, was 9. He married Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh on 5 July 1494, in Disley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 11 daughters. He died on 18 September 1531, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton est né en 1476, à Poynton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Warren, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Gerard, avait 9 ans. Il a épousé Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh le 5 juillet 1494, à Disley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 11 filles. Il est décédé le 18 septembre 1531, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.Poynton-with-Worth, Cheshire East, Engla: Cheshire East, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton 1476 in Poynton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Warren 41 und seine Mutter Eleanor Gerard 9. Er hat am 5. Juli 1494 in Disley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 11 Töchter. Er starb am 18. September 1531 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Prestbury, Cheshire, England und wurde in Prestbury, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton è nato il nel 1476 nel Poynton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Warren, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Gerard, aveva 9 anni. Lui sposato Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh il 5 luglio 1494, nel Disley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 11 figlie. Morì il 18 settembre 1531, nel Prestbury, Cheshire, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poyntonが1476年にイギリスチェシュアイアポイントンで生まれた時，父Sir John Warrenは41歳，母Eleanor Gerardは9歳であった。1494年7月5日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアディスリーでLady Baroness Margaret de Leghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と11人の娘の親であった。彼は1531年9月18日にイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーで55歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton(이)가 1476년 영국 체실르 포이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Warren(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Gerard(은)는 9세였다. 그는 1494년 7월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 디슬리에서 Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1531년 9월 18일 영국 체실르 플레스트버이에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 플레스트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.Poynton-with-Worth, Cheshire East, Engla: Cheshire East, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton nasceu em 1476, em Poynton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Warren, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Gerard, tinha 9 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh em 5 de julho de 1494, em Disley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 11 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de setembro de 1531, em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Poynton-with-Worth, Cheshire East, Engla: Cheshire East, Cheshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Laurence Warenne Lord of Poynton родился в 1476 г. в местности поинтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Warren было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Gerard, 9. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Baroness Margaret de Legh 5 июля 1494 г. в местности дисли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 11 дочерей. Он умер 18 сентября 1531 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности престбури, чешир, Англия.
